Sale.title: Sale
Sale.description: A transaction record for water sales

amount.description: The amount of the sale in Rp

item.description: The description of the item sold (e.g. Refill, Galon Baru)

createdAt.description: The creation timestamp in ISO 8601 format

ownerId.description: The user ID of the transaction owner

sales/{saleId}.description: Sales collection indexed by sale unique ID
